strategy: Always have a shield up before you attack him or a minion. Attacking unshielded triggers Vampire (600 Death steal) on you.
From round 2, every other round he strips all shields and traps off a random wizard. Reapply your shield and time traps to hit the same round you set them.
Hit with Storm or Death (+30% incoming); avoid Myth (40% resist).
AoE the three minions with the boss, or shield up and focus him.
Blade and Feint behind a shield, then burst the 7960 health.
cheatNotes: Attacking him or a minion without a shield on you triggers a 600-damage Vampire steal. Keep a shield up before every attack.
From round 2, every other round he strips all shields and traps off a random wizard. Do not rely on traps lasting, and re-shield after.
